notes: GCC profile for US Government Community Cloud (not GCC High/DoD).
GCC uses worldwide endpoints for Graph and portal, but feature rollout can differ from commercial.

testUsers.note: Graph user and group automation available in GCC.

sensitivityLabels.note: Core sensitivity labeling and auto-labeling capabilities are available.

dlp.note: Core Purview DLP capabilities are available.

retention.note: Retention and lifecycle management capabilities are available.

communicationCompliance.note: Feature parity and release cadence may differ in GCC; validate DSPM/advanced workflows in tenant before production runs.

insiderRisk.note: Insider Risk capabilities are available but may differ by rollout stage in GCC.

testData.note: Graph sendMail test seeding available in GCC.

auditConfig.note: Unified audit log configuration available in GCC.

conditionalAccess.note: Conditional Access policy automation via Graph API available in GCC.
